mercy+: a good hand in a bad system
the captain who stops for beacons
mercy-: a captain with ice for blood
law+: a captain the patrols wave through
daring+: a captain who laughs at long odds
the one who flies into the deep

mercy+: "That captain? Pulled a whole shuttle crew out of the black once. Good people, that one."
"They say that one never leaves a soul stranded. Rare, out here."
mercy-: "Heard that captain hands folk over without blinking. Don't get on the wrong berth."
"Cold, that one. Do the job, feel nothing. Useful, I suppose."
law+: "Clean registry, that captain. Union practically salutes 'em. Bit dull, if you ask me."
"Never runs anything they shouldn't. You could set a customs clock by 'em."
law-: "That captain? Patrols would love a word. Keeps a hidden hold, or I'm a Union clerk."
"Runs the shady freight and runs it well. The Syndicate's noticed."
daring+: "Flies into places that eat ships whole and comes back grinning. Mad, or blessed."
"That one takes the runs nobody sane will. Legend in the making, or a wreck in the making."
daring-: "Careful captain, that. Never caught short, never caught out. Never first through a door, either."
"Slow and sure. Won't gamble your cargo, won't gamble much of anything."

mercy+: The crew's noticed you never leave anyone behind. Word like that travels.
Someone at the last port called you a soft touch. They didn't mean it kindly. You didn't mind.
mercy-: There's a new quiet when you walk into a cantina. Word's gotten around what you're willing to do.
The crew doesn't meet your eye the way they used to. They've seen what you'll trade away.
law+: Your registry's getting a reputation — clean as a whistle. Patrols barely slow down for you now.
A dockhand mentions the Union speaks well of you. Feels strange to be liked by them.
law-: Your name's started showing up on the wrong lists. Patrols look twice now.
Somebody dockside called you a smuggler like it was a compliment. Out here, maybe it is.
daring+: They're starting to tell stories about the runs you'll take. Some of them are even true.
A pilot at the bar bought you a drink just to ask if the deep-black rumors about you are real.
daring-: Word is you're a careful one. Safe hands. It's not the worst thing to be known for.
Somebody called you cautious. It stung a little. It also kept you alive this long.
